name: Mashed Potato Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix warm mashed potatoes with sifted sugar until well combined.
2. Roll out the mixture in an oblong shape.
3. Spread peanut butter evenly over the rolled-out dough.
4. Roll up the dough like a jelly roll, ensuring it is tightly wrapped.
5. Cut the roll into slices using a sharp knife.
